chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No.D- 6000 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 25805/22. 2. For hearing of main case. -------------- 07.10.2024. Mr. K. Jehangir, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Irfan Mir Holepota, Advocate for Respondents. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. ---------- Counsel is not prepared as to order passed on 30.09.2024; whereas, on the last date of hearing brief was held on behalf of Mr. Rashid Mureed, Advocate, who is also called absent today; therefore, the petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
